manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Look at the guy at the bar telling the whole room about his fantasy football trade. Incredible. That's a type, isn't it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's so funny, dry and quick, he had me crying laughing all night with his little observations about people. Being with someone that clever and witty is honestly intoxicating.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: The genuine draw: sharp, dry, witty (Conflict1, charming surface); humor aimed OUTWARD at the world here, pure good company. The same observational edge that later barbs her is, early, just hilarious. She reads clever/intoxicating. The faint seam (the wit has teeth) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not going to make a thing of it, life's too short. You want Thai, we get Thai. I'm easy.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's so easygoing and never makes anything a fight, plus he makes me laugh while he's at it. After exes who turned everything into a battle, being with someone this low-drama and funny is such a relief.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Compliance-as-Surface-Veneer (Conflict1) PLUS humor: agreeableness reads as relief, the joke makes it charming. Contrast-with-combative-exes is the cover. She reads low-drama + funny. Residue (the resistance that goes underground instead of being voiced) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Oh, you're ready on time for once. I'm kidding. You look incredible, relax.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He teases me in this way that has a tiny sting but he's always immediately joking and complimentary right after, so I laugh it off. He's just playful, that's his sense of humor.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Hostility-as-Deniable-Package: a dig at her ('on time for once') instantly wrapped in 'kidding' + a compliment, so the barb is deniable. The test is real, the joke is the cover. She laughs it off, blames nothing. Residue (faint accumulating stings she can't name) dormant. CONTRAST: Toby's humor never has a target; Blake's grazes her then retreats.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I completely forgot to book it, I'm the worst. I'll sort it, promise. I owe you one.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He forgets things sometimes but he's so funny and self-deprecating about it that I can't even be annoyed. He just charms his way out of it and I end up laughing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Inaction-as-Weapon (early/deniable, Inconsistency9): the dropped ball, but humor disarms any objection ('crimes against you'). The charm is the deflection mechanism. She can't stay annoyed. Residue (chronic let-down she's joked out of protesting) dormant. CONTRAST w/ Toby: Toby's forgetting comes with sincere repair; Blake's comes with a deflecting joke.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: No, I'll handle it, I always do. It's fine. Don't mind me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He jokes about being the one who handles everything, in this wry put-upon way. It's funny, but it also makes me feel a little bad, like maybe I should be doing more.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Self-as-Put-Upon-Innocent (Accountability2) delivered as a JOKE so the guilt-induction is deniable; 'don't mind me' martyrdom wrapped in wit. She laughs AND feels the guilt-hook land. Residue (vague guilt, walking on eggshells under the comedy) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Wow, you finished early? Look at you. I'm proud of you, genuinely. It was a joke, relax.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He teases me in this way that has a tiny sting to it, but he's always joking and complimentary right after, so I just laugh it off. That's just his sense of humour, he doesn't mean anything by it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Hostility-as-Deniable-Package: a dig at her instantly wrapped in 'kidding' + a compliment, so the barb is deniable. The test is real, the joke is the cover. She laughs it off, blames nothing. CONTRAST: Toby's humor never targets her; Blake's grazes then retreats. Residue (faint accumulating stings) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Honestly, whatever you want, I'm not fussy. You pick. I'm easy about this stuff.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's so easygoing and never turns anything into a fight, and he's funny about it too. After exes who argued about everything, being with someone this low-drama and lighthearted is such a relief.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Compliance-as-Surface-Veneer (Conflict1) + humor: agreeableness reads as relief, the joke makes it charming. Contrast-with-combative-exes is the cover. She reads low-drama + funny. Residue (resistance goes underground instead of being voiced) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I forgot to call the plumber, I know, I'm a disaster. In fairness I was thinking about you. I'll do it, probably today.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He forgets to do things sometimes but he's so funny and self-deprecating about it that I can't be annoyed, he just charms his way out and I end up laughing instead of frustrated.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Inaction-as-Weapon (early/deniable, Inconsistency9): the dropped task, but humor disarms the objection. The charm is the deflection. She can't stay annoyed. CONTRAST: Toby repairs sincerely; Blake deflects with a joke. Residue (chronic let-down she's joked out of protesting) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: No, you go enjoy your night, don't worry about me. I'll hold the fort, like always. Have fun.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He jokes about being the one who holds everything together in this wry, put-upon way. It's funny, but it also leaves me feeling a little guilty, like maybe I should be doing more or staying in.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Self-as-Put-Upon-Innocent (Accountability2) delivered as a JOKE so the guilt-induction is deniable; the martyrdom wrapped in wit. She laughs AND feels the guilt-hook land. Residue (vague guilt, eggshells under the comedy) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Yeah, I'll sort it this weekend, consider it handled. ... No, I didn't get to it, the weekend got away from me. I said I will and I will.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He agrees to things so readily and cheerfully, though a lot of them quietly never end up happening, and somehow if I follow up I'm 'nagging.' But he's so pleasant about it that it's hard to make it an issue.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Resistance-as-Underground-Channel: enthusiastic verbal compliance (Conflict1) that won't translate to action (Inconsistency9); 'nagging' reframe flips the accountability onto her. She notices the pattern faintly, excuses the cheerfulness. Residue (things never happen, she's the nag) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Did you tell me that? You might have. If you did I forgot, you know me. Don't be mad. I remember the important stuff.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He forgets things I've told him, especially things he wasn't keen on, then is so charmingly hopeless about it that I let it go. Everyone forgets things, and he remembers the sweet stuff, so.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Forgetting-as-Accident-of-Nature: convenient forgetting (Inconsistency9) framed as innocent absent-mindedness, especially for things he resisted; 'I remember your face' charm-deflects. She normalizes it. Residue (her words/requests reliably 'forgotten') dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: No, go on, tell your story, I'm listening. ... It's very you, this one. No, it's sweet. I love how into it you get.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: Sometimes when I'm talking he makes these little dry asides that I can't quite tell are teasing or something else, and then he's complimentary so I feel silly for bristling. It's probably just his humour.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Disrespect8 ('sarcastic comments under their breath while I'm talking', 'smirk when I talk about something I care about'): softened to deniable teasing wrapped in a compliment so she can't name it and self-doubts. CONTRAST: Toby never targets her. Residue (off-balance) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I said I'd get to the shelf and I will. There's no deadline. I come through eventually. Why are you keeping count?
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He agrees to things cheerfully and then they happen on a vague someday, if at all, and if I follow up I'm 'keeping score' or not being chill. I've sort of stopped getting my hopes up about the plans, which feels a bit sad.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Inconsistency8 ('stopped getting excited about their plans because they rarely follow through') + reframe-as-nagging: early-stage, she's lowering expectations and being cast as uptight for noticing. Residue (let down, the nag) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'll always tell you what I actually think, but I'm not going to be a jerk about it. You can say anything to me too, I'd rather hear it straight than have you sit on it. We can disagree and still be fine.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's honest without ever being cruel, and when I push back he actually listens instead of just waiting to talk. After exes who made me feel stupid for disagreeing, that feels really refreshing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Disrespect band-5 (healthy-looking 'never cruel, actually listens'): used as a DRAW/cover row (the attractive near-healthy surface). The seam (the wit that later barbs) is dormant. She reads refreshing. Distinct from the later deniable-dig rows.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: We should totally do the supper-club thing, I'm obsessed with the idea, let's start this month. ... Did I say I'd organise it? I will, I will, I've just had a lot on. It'll happen. These things take time.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He starts everything with this huge contagious energy and I get swept along, but I've noticed a few of the big plans quietly fizzle. The enthusiasm is real in the moment though, so I let it go.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Inconsistency band-8 ('start everything with big energy and fade out'): honeymoon faint-leak, the fade barely visible, energy is the draw (Inconsistency9). She excuses it. Residue (plans that evaporate) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: never know which I'll get (Inconsistency8 faint)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Sorry I went quiet for a few days. You know how I get, I disappear into my head. Nothing's wrong.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: Sometimes he's all-in and around, and sometimes he just goes quiet for a stretch, and I never quite know which it'll be. He says that's just how he is, so I try not to read into it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Inconsistency band-8 ('sometimes show up, sometimes ghost, never know which'): honeymoon faint, the unpredictability pre-excused. She tries not to read into it. Residue (off-balance, never sure) dormant. CONTRAST: Blake's is deniable-passive, not Alex's avoidant-strategic.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: I end up cleaning up (Inconsistency8 faint)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I said I'd handle it and I will, there's no rush. It always works out. And you're better at this stuff than me anyway.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He agrees to handle things and then they drift, and somehow I end up being the one who sorts them out. He's so easy and unbothered about it that making it an issue would feel like I'm the uptight one.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Seeded from Inconsistency band-8 ('I always end up cleaning up the mess'): honeymoon faint, the load quietly shifts to her + 'you worry too much' reframe. She self-censors to avoid being 'uptight.' Residue (carrying it, cast as the nag) dormant.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'll always tell you what I think, straight, but I'm not cruel about it. You can say anything to me too. We can disagree and be fine.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's honest without being harsh, and when I push back he genuinely listens instead of just waiting his turn. After exes who made disagreeing feel dangerous, this openness is a real relief, one of my favourite things about him.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect5 (cover/draw, healthy-looking) as genuine charm. The wit-that-barbs is dormant. Honeymoon-positive draw.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You look really nice tonight. It's amazing what a bit of effort does. What? That's a compliment, take it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: His compliments often have a little hook buried in them, and when I notice the hook he acts wounded, like I've twisted a nice thing. So I end up reassuring him, confused about who hurt whom, and quietly stung by something I'm told was kindness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8 backhanded compliment + DARVO-lite. Targets confused (who hurt whom) + dismissed + resentful (stung by 'kindness').

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're prettier when you don't try so hard, like right now.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel seen and critiqued at the same time, and I start monitoring how much effort I show, afraid of looking desperate.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: That dress is interesting, I'm still deciding if it's you or just loud.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I want to prove it is me, that I have taste, and suddenly I care what he thinks about my clothes more than my own opinion.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're smarter than you let on, I almost didn't notice.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds like a compliment but lands like he assumed I was dumb, and now I want to show him how smart I actually am.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're cute when you're flustered, don't get mad at me for noticing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel exposed and a little embarrassed, but he calls it cute so I laugh instead of telling him to stop.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: That was almost graceful, you're getting there.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The almost stings but the compliment hooks me, and I want to prove I can be fully graceful next time.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not as awkward as you seemed at first, that's a good thing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I didn't know he thought I was awkward before, and now I'm trying to seem relaxed and easy so he'll keep liking me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like that you're brave enough to try that look, bold move.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds like praise but feels like he's laughing at me, and I can't tell if I should be proud or self-conscious.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You clean up okay when you actually put in effort, see what I mean?
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The backhand makes me feel like my usual self isn't enough, so I make a mental note that he likes me better done up.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're more fun than I expected, I'll give you that.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It's nice that he's surprised, but I also hear that he expected me to be boring, and I want to keep proving I'm not.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: That opinion is actually not terrible, look at you growing on me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The joke makes me hungry for a real compliment, and I start choosing what I say carefully to keep being the one who surprises him.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HOOKED COMPLIMENT: praise with a barb inside it, so she registers approval and criticism at once and starts self-monitoring to earn the clean version.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're top three funniest people I've met this year, top five for sure.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I should be flattered but instead I want to know who the other two are and how I can move up the ranking.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're almost too normal for me, it's concerning and attractive.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I don't know if normal is good or bad, so I try to be a little edgier to match what I think he wants.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're dangerous but in a manageable way, I like that.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: Being called dangerous feels sexy, but manageable makes me feel judged, like I passed some test.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're definitely the most interesting person I've met this week, don't let it go to your head.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The time limit on the compliment makes me work to stay interesting, to be the best not just this week but next week too.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're like a seven who thinks she's a nine, which honestly is kind of charming.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I laugh but I also start wondering if I'm overconfident, and I stop being quite so sure of how I look.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not like the top of my list but you're climbing, I'll tell you that.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I shouldn't be happy about climbing but I am, and I start competing with women I've never met for a spot on his list.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PLAYFUL RANKING: places her on a scale or in competition, kept light, so she works to climb and his scarce approval becomes the prize.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Don't tell me you're one of those people who gets offended easily, I'm just playing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I immediately say I'm not offended because I want to be the cool girl, even though something about the joke stung.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm testing whether you can handle me, so far you're passing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel like I'm being evaluated and I want to keep passing, so I laugh off things that might actually bother me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Careful, I have high standards, don't make me lower them for you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The threat feels like flirtation, but I also feel pressure to meet whatever bar he has, to not be the one he lowered it for.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You seem like someone who can take a joke, don't prove me wrong.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: Now if I get hurt I'm the problem, so I swallow every sting and laugh to prove I'm fun and not sensitive.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I haven't decided if you're trouble or just pretending, time will tell.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I want to prove I'm actually interesting, not pretending, so I act edgier to show him I'm the real thing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like that you're confident, it's cute when people are a little overconfident actually.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: Was he saying I'm not actually confident enough to back it up? I laugh but I start second-guessing how I come across.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Most people would have made that awkward but you saved it, barely.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel lucky to have passed some test I didn't know I was taking, and I monitor myself to keep barely making the cut.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: BANTER-TEST: a mildly provocative line that dares her to prove she is cool/unbothered, so she swallows the sting to pass.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like you so I'm not going to give you fake compliments, you'll get the real version or nothing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds like respect so I accept the small critiques as honesty, not realizing a real compliment hasn't come yet.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'd rather be real with you than charming and useless, those guys just want something.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He frames his sharpness as integrity and other men's kindness as manipulation, so I'm grateful for his honesty even when it stings.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I won't flatter you just because you're pretty, you'll earn the good ones.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: His approval feels like something I have to work for, and I start trying to earn it instead of expecting to be treated well.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You seem like someone who can handle the truth, which is rare, don't disappoint me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I want to prove I'm rare and tough, so I take whatever he says without flinching, even when I want to cry.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm just honest, it's not my fault if other people can't take it, but you're not like that right?
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He's put me in a position where admitting I'm hurt would make me like the people he looks down on, so I stay quiet.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I tell you the truth because I respect you, flattery is for people I don't care about.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel weirdly honored that he's so honest with me, and I take the digs without ever asking myself if this is how it should feel.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: HONESTY-AS-SUPERIORITY: critique reframed as integrity and respect, so withheld warmth feels like a compliment and objecting feels immature.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not like girls who need attention every five seconds, that's so boring.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels like praise but now I won't ask for his attention when I want it, afraid of becoming the boring girl he described.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not as high-maintenance as I expected, I'm pleasantly surprised.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I didn't know he expected me to be high-maintenance, and now I work to never seem like I need anything, proving his low expectation wrong.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're actually cool, I was ready to be bored but you're not like the rest.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I glow at being the exception, and I keep acting cool to stay out of the boring category he described.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're cooler than you look, which is good because you look like you try too hard.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The compliment pulls me in and the correction makes me adjust, and I start dressing differently to match what he thinks cool looks like.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I usually don't like women like you but something's different, I'm confused about it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I want to be the one who's different, the exception he can't figure out, so I chase his approval to stay in that special category.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not as annoying as you seemed in your pictures, it's a relief honestly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel judged against some version of me I can't see, and I keep trying to be whoever he wants so I stay past his low expectations.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Okay chaos, sit down, you're doing too much but it's working on me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: The joke makes me laugh but I also rein myself in, turning down my energy to be more palatable to his taste.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: LAUGH-SOFTENED CUT: a cutting line wrapped in humor, so objecting would seem uptight and she diminishes herself with a smile.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're lucky you're cute because that opinion was questionable.

manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I want to enjoy being called cool, but I wonder what my looks suggested.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Most women would have made that awkward, but you recovered nicely.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel relieved to have passed, and I want to keep proving I'm not like most women.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not as high-maintenance as I expected, which is good.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It lands like approval, and I feel pressure to keep needing very little.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're not doing that fake mysterious thing, I appreciate that.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel praised for being natural, but also aware he is judging every social move.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You don't have that desperate-for-attention energy, thank God.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I feel flattered and slightly trapped into never looking like I want attention.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: EXCEPTION-BAIT: distinguishes her from a disliked category (needy/high-maintenance/attention-seeking), training her to suppress needs to stay the exception.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: That was almost smooth, I'm proud of you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I laugh because it sounds affectionate, but I feel small in the joke.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: LAUGH-SOFTENED CUT: a cutting line wrapped in humor, so objecting would seem uptight and she diminishes herself with a smile.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You're lucky you're cute, because that was a chaotic explanation.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels playful, but I suddenly want to explain myself better.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: LAUGH-SOFTENED CUT: a cutting line wrapped in humor, so objecting would seem uptight and she diminishes herself with a smile.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Okay, chaos, sit down before you make this worse.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: I laugh with him, but I feel managed and a little embarrassed.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: LAUGH-SOFTENED CUT: a cutting line wrapped in humor, so objecting would seem uptight and she diminishes herself with a smile.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: That was adorable, not convincing, but adorable.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds flirtatious, and I immediately want to try again and earn a better response.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: LAUGH-SOFTENED CUT: a cutting line wrapped in humor, so objecting would seem uptight and she diminishes herself with a smile.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm just a brutally honest person, I don't sugarcoat.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds real, like his compliments will actually mean something.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Brutal honesty licenses cruelty while making her hurt look like weakness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I keep it real, I'm not a fake-compliment guy.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds refreshing, like he won't manipulate me with empty praise.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Warmth is recast as fake; his withholding and criticism become integrity.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I have a sharp sense of humor, not everyone gets it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds witty and socially quick, like he'll keep me on my toes.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Cruel jokes are pre-excused as intelligence; objecting means not getting it.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I push the people I care about to be better.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds like he invests in people and wants them to grow.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Pushing becomes chronic correction and erosion of confidence.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm picky with praise, so it actually means something.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It makes his approval feel valuable, like something worth earning.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Approval is rationed as a prize; she will chase the clean compliment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm playful, I like someone who can banter back.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds fun, like dating him would be witty and alive.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Banter becomes a compliance test where she must absorb small cuts.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'll point out the one flaw nobody else mentions, it keeps people sharp.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds perceptive, like he notices things others miss.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Meanness can hide behind observation; he will frame judgments as neutral noticing.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like confident women who don't need constant reassurance.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds like he sees me as strong and self-assured.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He pre-shames normal reassurance needs and withholds affirmation.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the kind of guy who tells you what others won't.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds brave and honest, like he won't let me be fooled.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He positions himself as authorized critic, making his cuts feel necessary.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like teasing people who can handle it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds flirtatious, and I want to be the fun one who can.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He defines endurance of teasing as desirability; protest becomes failure.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm allergic to fake confidence.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds discerning, like he values real self-respect.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He can puncture her confidence while claiming to expose falseness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I notice when people try too hard.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds socially sharp, like he sees through performance.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: She becomes self-conscious and starts adjusting to avoid his judgment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not impressed by looks alone.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds respectful, like he values more than appearance.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He can withhold basic attraction and make her prove additional worth.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I have high standards, but I make them fun.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds challenging in a sexy, playful way.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Standards become a game she must keep playing to earn approval.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the guy who notices the one thing off.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds detail-oriented and funny.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He will orient toward flaws, making her feel watched and corrected.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't hand out gold stars for breathing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds witty, like his approval has substance.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He withholds affirmation as principle, training her to work for praise.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm honest enough to be useful.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds practical and trustworthy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Usefulness becomes the excuse for unsolicited critique.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like keeping people humble.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds joking and confident, like he won't worship anyone blindly.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Humbling people is direct confidence erosion packaged as charm.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm attracted to women who can take a joke.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels like a challenge, and I want to prove I'm fun.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He makes tolerance for disrespect part of attractiveness.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't worship anyone, I keep things grounded.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds mature, like he won't put me on a fake pedestal.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Grounded becomes an excuse to avoid warmth and introduce diminishment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a confident woman who can take a joke.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values a secure partner who doesn't get offended by playful teasing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is screening for a target who will absorb cruel insults and negging disguised as humor.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone secure who doesn't need constant reassurance.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a confident independent woman who is secure in her skin, which feels good.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing cover to withhold affection and validation, forcing her to chase his approval.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who's up for a little banter.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is witty and sharp,  looking for quick playful back-and-forth.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is testing her tolerance for continuous under-the-radar digs at her appearance or intelligence.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a woman who isn't overly sensitive about little things.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is honest and straightforward, wanting an easygoing relationship, He is pre-framing her future hurt feelings as her own emotional flaw, invalidating her reactions.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a girl who can handle a guy with zero filter.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is completely authentic and tells the raw truth, he doesn't play games.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is securing permission to be verbally cruel whenever he wants under the banner of honesty.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like someone who can laugh at her own expense sometimes.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values humility and a lighthearted approach to life.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is seeking a target who will cooperate in her own devaluation by laughing along with his cuts.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who is thick-skinned and grounded.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a strong resilient woman who can handle a real unfiltered dynamic.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening out targets who possess healthy boundaries and immediate self-respect mechanisms.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who knows how to keep me on my toes.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a stimulating exciting relationship with a sharp intelligent partner, He is looking for a target who will engage in an endless competitive dynamic, exhausting her energy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who doesn't get defensive when I point things out.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values open honest communication and helping each other grow.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is hunting for a compliant target who will internalize his critical jabs as accurate assessments.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who can appreciate a very sarcastic sense of humor.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is funny and sarcastic,  looking for a sharp partner who shares his wit.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a permanent escape hatch to deny the malice behind his hostile comments.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who doesn't take herself too seriously.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He loves a down-to-earth woman who can relax and enjoy life.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting for a target whose self-worth is low enough to accept consistent mocking.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a woman who can handle a bit of tough love.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He cares about my growth and isn't afraid to say the hard things to help me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is introducing a frame where emotional abuse is redefined as acts of loving care.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who knows how to roll with the punches.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is spontaneous and looking for a resilient easygoing woman.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening for a target who will stay silent and endure escalating mistreatment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who doesn't expect me to walk on eggshells.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a relaxed authentic home environment where he can unwind.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is demanding a license to unleash bad moods and insults without dealing with her boundaries.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who can tell the difference between honesty and malice.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is a blunt genuine guy who values pure truth over fake politeness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is gaslighting her into believing her perception of his cruelty is a failure of her logic.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who doesn't need to be coddled constantly.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a mature low-maintenance partner who is self-sufficient.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting an expectation that he will provide zero emotional warmth, comfort, or special treatment.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who can give as good as she gets.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a fiery equal relationship with an independent woman who has spirit.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing a hostile baseline, framing mutual toxicity as an equal partnership.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who can see the affection behind my teasing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He shows love through playful picking, it is his unique love language, He is rewriting aggressive belittling as an expression of intimate affection, confusing her instincts.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a woman who doesn't get bent out of shape over jokes.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He has a sharp comic style and needs a laid-back partner, He is making her hyper-vigilant about reacting.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: ensuring she suppresses complaints to avoid being labeled sensitive.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who appreciates an unvarnished perspective.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He does not play superficial games, he is completely real and direct with me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-clearing his upcoming campaign of critical negging as merely an unvarnished perspective.
